To simplify internationalization and make every app accessible to users

This page tests template literals, multi-line text, custom component
        props, plural patterns, and other advanced JSX patterns.

advanced-jsx.thisIsACompleteSentenceIn: This is a complete sentence in a template literal.

This is a long paragraph that spans multiple lines in the source code
          and should be treated as a single translatable string by the scanner.

Our platform helps you build, deploy, and scale your applications with

Scanner cannot trace text values through spread operators. This is a
          known limitation.
